artifact_reuse: v06d18 feature matrix, IL weights, decision rows (declared)
reason: Full pipeline on episodes-06-24 with fixed seed completed cleanly. CRITICAL FINDING: dual eval reveals dim96 win-label leakage. Stored-feature margin=+0.0068 but inference-feature margin=-0.0009 (near-zero). v07d4 stored margin of 0.057 was inflated. True policy quality is near-zero. Research baseline must be recalibrated to inference-feature eval. All hard gates pass; smoke gate confirmed.

research_baseline_prior.note: v07d4 stored-feature eval; now known to be inflated by dim96 leakage

training_summary.win_rate_collapse_note: win_rate dropped 0.59->0.26 during training, likely IL anchor (lambda_il=1.0) suppressing RL signal

exploration_summary: CRITICAL FINDING — dim96 leakage quantified. dim96 is set to 1.0 for winners and 0.0 for losers in the stored training features. At inference, dim96=1.0 for all decisions. Stored-feature eval preserves this leakage (inflated margin). Inference-feature eval removes it (true margin). Result: stored=+0.0068, inference=-0.0009. All prior v07d2-v07d4 stored margins (0.034, 0.008, 0.057) were inflated. True policy advantage over IL is near-zero. Inference-feature eval is now the authoritative primary metric going forward.
known_risks: win_rate collapse 0.59->0.26: IL anchor too strong (lambda_il=1.0). RL may not be learning to win.
inference-feature margin near-zero suggests minimal true winner-selective learning so far.
next_candidates: [aggressive] v07d6: REINFORCE with moving-average baseline replacing PPO. Larger gradient updates, no clip. Also reduce lambda_il to 0.5 to let RL dominate. Primary metric: inference-feature winner_margin.
[conservative] v07d7: offline PPO on large episode buffer (collect from v07d5 or fresh) with inference-feature eval as primary metric. Re-establish calibrated baseline.
[conservative] v07d8: reduce lambda_il from 1.0 to 0.1 in online RL, monitor win_rate recovery.
[aggressive] v07d9: remove dim96 entirely from feature vector; retrain IL from scratch on cleaned features.
